title: Vaccine-Associated Measles Encephalitis in Immunocompromised Child, California, USA.
ehr_evidence: None. The manuscript is a single case report and does not mention the use of Electronic Health Records (EHR) or linked health data.
summary: A case report of a fatal vaccine-associated measles encephalitis in an immunocompromised child in California, USA, who developed the infection following MMR ProQuad vaccination and a stem cell transplant.
key_findings: Confirmed measles virus (MV) infection in brain tissue via whole-genome RNA sequencing.
Observed biased matrix-gene hypermutation consistent with persistent measles virus central nervous system infection.
